## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] 🎨 Style / UI change
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] My changes follow the project's code style (run `npm run lint`)
- [ ] I have not introduced new `console.log` statements (use `console.error` / `console.warn`)
- [ ] New and existing functionality works in the browser
- [ ] No new ESLint warnings were introduced
- [ ] I have updated documentation if behavior changed
- [ ] Dependent changes have been merged and published
